hero.label: Information
hero.title_html:
Designer, developer, and
observer of life.
I build meu.ponto.

about.label: About
about.title: a life in constant progress.
about.intro: This website is my living archive: a place to organize what I build, study, photograph, and write. I prefer to treat career and life as one story: technical, personal, and human at the same time.

focus.label: Current Focus
focus.title: Turning everyday signals into digital products with identity.
focus.body: Interface, content, and visual systems working together without noise.

base.label: Foundation
base.title: Interface design, front-end, and editorial strategy.
base.body: From concept to code, with focus on clarity, rhythm, and performance.

direction.label: Direction
direction.title: Building a personal ecosystem, not just a portfolio.
direction.body: meu.ponto as a continuous lab for thought, product, and digital presence.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.y2009: Start of my digital presence and the desire to build on my own domain.
timeline.y2024: Consolidation of an author workflow: notes, visual essays, and recurring writing.
timeline.y2026: Thierry Rene Matos becomes a biographical platform: brutalist, modular, and data-driven.

empty.label: No results
empty.body: No photography found for the selected filter.

contact.title: Let's build something real.
contact.intro: Fill out the form so we can talk about product, design, front-end, or editorial collaborations. Expected response within 2 business days.

form.consent: I agree to be contacted by email based on the information submitted in this form.

status.required_error: Please review required fields before sending.
status.success: Your email app was opened. If needed, send directly to ola@seuemail.com.
status.send_error: Could not start sending. Please try again shortly.

comments.title: Comments
comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first to comment.

message.title: Private message
message.help: Local interaction for UX prototyping. In production this should use an authenticated backend.

footer.left: Made with love on a Sunday afternoon
